name: Blue Ridge Bays
address: 271 Old Barn Rd Suite A, Hendersonville, NC 28791
about: Blue Ridge Bays is a self-service, fully-automated golf simulator facility located in Hendersonville, NC. It operates as a gym-for-golf model, where members and guests book sessions online, receive a door code for entry, and enjoy access to climate-controlled bays 24/7. The facility is powered by Trackman technology, offering a premium indoor golf experience with real-time performance data and access to over 400 global courses. Pricing is structured with hourly sessions starting from $60 per hour, and membership options beginning at $90 per month, with discounted rates for additional players. This venue is best for golfers seeking flexible, year-round practice and play in a modern, convenient setting.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 self-service access with online booking and door codes
Premium Trackman technology with detailed shot tracking and course variety
Flexible pricing model with hourly sessions and membership options
Integration with the Trackman app for performance tracking and session planning

food_and_drink.notes: Complimentary non-alcoholic snacks available; outside food is prohibited.
Alcohol is prohibited inside the facility.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor providing real-time shot data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers must bring their own clubs as the facility does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Non-alcoholic beverages are allowed, and complimentary non-alcoholic snacks are provided. Alcohol and outside food are prohibited.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round depends on the course and pace of play, but sessions are booked by the hour, typically allowing 1-2 hours for a full round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility welcomes families and is suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
